# Beta Minimal

A synthetic test skill with only `name` and `description` in the
frontmatter — mirrors the `skill-creator` pattern in the M1 corpus,
which predates the formal authoring guide.

## Workflow

This skill is loaded to verify the loader's permissive mode.
